channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Family affair: 204th-ranked Vacherot stuns Djokovic and will face cousin in Shanghai final
item.description: SHANGHAI (AP) — Two cousins will meet in the final of the Shanghai Masters after qualifier Valentin Vacherot stunned a hobbled Novak Djokovic and relative Arthur Rinderknech fought back to beat Daniil Medvedev on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A'ja Wilson makes unprecedented history as Aces win third WNBA championship in 4 years
item.description: A'ja Wilson became the first player in WNBA history to win the regular-season MVP, Defensive Player of the Year and Finals MVP in the same season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tarik Skubal turns in a dominant performance in Detroit's Game 5 loss to Mariners
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Tarik Skubal was terrific. And he was long gone when the season ended for the Detroit Tigers. Skubal struck out 13 in six dominant innings in Game 5 of the AL Division Series at Seattle on Friday night. But the Tigers were eliminated when Jorge Polanco singled home J.P.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 24 South Florida scores 4 TDs in a 3 1/2-minute span and hands North Texas its 1st loss
item.description: DENTON, Texas (AP) — Byrum Brown threw three touchdown passes and ran for two more scores, Jhalyn Shuler returned a fumble 34 yards for South Florida's fourth TD in span of 3 1/2 minutes and the No. 24 Bulls beat North Texas 63-36 on Friday night, handing the Mean Green their first loss this season.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Albert Pujols has met with the Angels about their managerial opening, AP source says
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Albert Pujols has met with the Los Angeles Angels about returning to their dugout as their next manager, a person with knowledge of the meeting told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Minnesota declines Trump admin's ultimatum to protect girls sports despite pleas from schools and athletes
item.description: Minnesota rejected the federal ultimatum over transgender athletes despite hundreds of school board members urging compliance with Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Beards are back for the New York Islanders after old-school executive Lou Lamoriello's departure
item.description: EAST MEADOW, N.Y. (AP) — Images from the New York Islanders’ annual charity golf outing last month on social media went viral because something was very different about some of the familiar faces fans have seen for years. Many had beards on them.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Indonesia to block Israeli team from competing at gymnastics world championships in Jakarta
item.description: JAKARTA, Indonesia (AP) — Indonesia will block Israeli athletes from competing at the upcoming gymnastics world championships in Jakarta, a government official said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: NINIEK KARMINI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Matthew Boyd stars as the Cubs blank the Brewers 6-0 to send the NLDS to a deciding Game 5
item.description: Matthew Boyd pitched two-hit ball into the fifth inning, and the Chicago Cubs shut down the Milwaukee Brewers for a 6-0 victory Thursday night that pushed their NL Division Series all the way to a decisive Game 5.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Beehive Blitz- Week 9 Schedule and Scoreboard
item.description: It is Week 9 of the High School football season and ABC4 will be bringing you highlights of games being held across the state today on ABC4 News at 10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ticket prices for upcoming Lakers/Jazz game surge after rumors of Lebron James retirement
item.description: After a social media post from Lebron James that had people speculating on his retirement, ticket prices for next April's game between the Los Angeles Lakers and the Utah Jazz have surged. Those prices have stayed high, despite confirmation that James is not retiring.
item.dc:creator: Abigail Jones, ABC 4

item.title: Julio Rodríguez lifts Mariners over Tigers 3-2, Seattle takes Game 2 of ALDS to even series
item.description: Rodríguez hit a tiebreaking RBI double in the eighth inning and the Mariners beat the Detroit Tigers 3-2 in Game 2 of their AL Division Series on Sunday to even the series.
item.dc:creator: DOUG MILLER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Steven Fisk birdies his last 3 holes in Mississippi to win first PGA Tour title
item.description: Steven Fisk said he wasn't going to let anything get in the way of his first PGA Tour victory, and it took birdies on his last three holes Sunday to close with an 8-under 64 to win the Sanderson Farms Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NFL quarterback Mark Sanchez stabbed multiple times in altercation leading to charges against him
item.description: Former NFL quarterback Mark Sanchez was pepper-sprayed and stabbed multiple times during a late-night altercation with a 69-year-old truck driver in a downtown Indianapolis alley, which resulted in criminal charges against the Fox Sports analyst, according to court records filed Sunday.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER and MIKE MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL moves back above playoff line with 1-0 victory
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - In its final regular season home game of the year, Real Salt Lake came up with its biggest victory of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: It’s a boy! Phillies star Bryce Harper announces birth of fourth child ahead of NLDS opener
item.description: Phillies slugger Bryce Harper added to his family lineup when he and his wife, Kayla, welcomed the birth of their fourth child days ahead of Saturday's playoff opener.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Police arrest Mark Sanchez after downtown Indianapolis stabbing incident
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — Several sources, including ESPN and TMZ, have indicated that former NFL quarterback Mark Sanchez was seriously injured in a stabbing in downtown Indianapolis early Saturday morning.
item.dc:creator: Sam Maurer, NewsNation
